title: The White Moll
writer: Frank L. Packard, E. Lloyd Sheldon
actors: Pearl White, Richard Travers, Jack Baston
plot: Desperate because a wealthy man has reduced her father to thievery, Rhoda agrees to rob the poor box of the church, although she finds the act abhorrent. During the robbery, Rhoda's father is shot and dies in the priests's arms, s...
